MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-29-2019 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-26-2019 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-09-2018 Continued To Apr-02-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-02-2018 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Oct-31-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ramin Mahdavi, Esq. 800-506-2652 of the Moore Law Group for Plaintiff through Court Call.
Murlene Randle, Esq. 415-352-0189 for Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. Defendant's Counsel report she has has no communication with the Defendant and reports status of Discovery. Plaintiff does not oppose a trial continuance. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

LAW OFFICES OF MURLENE RANDLE, ATTORNEY LURLENE J. RANDLE'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL.

Granted. Ms. Randle to inform the Defendant by phone, text and email re: the Court's rulings of today. If the Defendant wants a trial continuance he must get in touch with Plaintiffs Counsel or make a motion.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
